title: Basalt Arena
description: This mod adds 3 new bosses and a new structure to Minecraft.
body:
# An Iterative Mod

The concept of this mod is simple and experimental:  
I created **three versions of the same basalt boss**, each one developed in a different amount of time — **10 minutes, 1 hour, and 10 hours** — to showcase how a boss can evolve with more polish and ideas.

The first two versions of the boss are **only available in Creative mode**.  
The final and most advanced version naturally spawns inside a dedicated structure called the **Basalt Arena**.

![Basalt Guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de36c7f6fcda18b9eb94a8a366b5018aeefc64c2_0.webp)

---

## ⚔️ Basalt Guardian

The Basalt Guardian is able to **heal itself** using the four **Basalt Crystals** surrounding the arena.  
However, these crystals can be destroyed when the boss accidentally shoots them with its own attacks.

![Basalt Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ade86fbf35e5a5da60bb52b0548ae332a4cc935f.png)

---

## 🔥 Basalt Wand

If you manage to defeat the Basalt Guardian, it will drop the **Basalt Wand**.  
This powerful item is fueled by **magma blocks** and allows you to shoot like the boss !

![Basalt Wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9919b22bdb69737adfe1ab750a5a4d32c5ba4126.png)

---

🎥 This mod was created as part of a YouTube video that will be released **very soon** on my channel — stay tuned!
